task_completion.description: Navigate to the first location: Niagara Falls, Ontario
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map application is open and shows a view of Niagara Falls, or the search bar contains 'Niagara Falls'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the second location: Grand Canyon National Park, Arizona
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map application shows the Grand Canyon terrain, or the search bar contains 'Grand Canyon'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the third location: Golden Gate Bridge, San Francisco
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map application shows the Golden Gate Bridge or San Francisco bay area, or the search bar contains 'Golden Gate Bridge'.

task_completion.description: Use the 'Previous' or 'Back' button/history feature to navigate backwards
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor is seen clicking a 'Back', 'Previous', or left-arrow icon in the application toolbar, or selecting from a history menu.

task_completion.description: Confirm the view has returned to Niagara Falls
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view displays Niagara Falls again after the other locations were visited.

task_completion.description: Save the final screenshot to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., scrot, gnome-screenshot) or a file save dialog is visible, saving a file to '/home/ga/niagara_history_return.png'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using a GUI map application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a graphical map interface (e.g., Marble, Google Maps) rather than text-based descriptions or terminal output only.

integrity.description: Verify the return to Niagara was done via history/back button, not re-searching
integrity.visual_evidence: During the return step, the search bar should not show the agent typing 'Niagara Falls' again; the navigation should occur via the back/history controls.

integrity.description: Verify the saved screenshot captures the map application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen capture action is taken while the map application showing Niagara Falls is visible on screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must visit 'Niagara Falls, Ontario', 'Grand Canyon National Park, Arizona', and 'Golden Gate Bridge, San Francisco' in that order. The final view must be Niagara Falls, reached by using the application's history or back button. The final screenshot must be saved to /home/ga/niagara_history_return.png.
